pkgmetadata.longdescription: ONNX Runtime is a cross-platform, high performance ML inferencing and training accelerator. It supports models in ONNX format and provides optimized inference using hardware-specific acceleration. This is a prebuilt binary package from PyPI wheels.
ONNX Runtime是一个跨平台、高性能的机器学习推理和训练加速器。它支持ONNX 格式的模型，并使用硬件特定的加速来提供优化的推理。这是一个来自PyPI wheels 的预构建二进制包。
